steps.title: This protocol performs a post-amplification 1X Purification using AMPure Beads
steps.instruction: This protocol performs a post-amplification 1X Purification using AMPure Beads. For detailed protocol steps, please see below.

steps.title: Add 90ul (50ul sample in there), Mix at 110ul, 7-10x
steps.instruction: Add 90ul (50ul sample in there), Mix at 110ul, 7-10x

steps.title: Remove 140ul supernatant into waste
steps.instruction: Remove 140ul supernatant into waste. Go down again.

steps.title: 200ul ethanol washes x2
steps.instruction: 200ul ethanol washes x2. Use one set of tips to add ethanol from top of the well.

steps.title: Resuspend beads with eb, mix 20...
steps.instruction: Resuspend beads with eb, mix 20 times, aspirate low dispense high, default flow rate.
